title: SJTU IOC Lab website is now online
summary: Version 1.1.0 is now available with local CMS publishing, publications, people profiles, and admin analytics.
content:
Our lab website officially went online on 2026-04-03.

The current release is Version 1.1.0. It includes publication pages, people pages, external paper/resource access, simple analytics, and a lightweight local content-management workflow.

Welcome to browse the site, read our publications, open available resources, and use the shared materials for academic purposes.
